commands.review_summary:
The PR changes doctor Codex route migration to preserve explicit non-default `agentRuntime` pins while rewriting legacy `openai-codex/*` refs, adds regression coverage, and updates the changelog.

Reproducibility: yes. The linked bug is source-reproducible through `maybeRepairCodexRoutes`, and the source PR provides terminal before/after output for the reported model-map config; the remaining provider-level gap follows from current `resolveModelRuntimePolicy` and `openAIProviderUsesCodexRuntimeByDefault` source paths.
commands.review_followup: The PR is already opted into ClawSweeper automerge and the blocker is a narrow doctor/test repair on the same files.

target.title: fix(doctor): preserve explicit agentRuntime pin during codex model migration [AI-assisted]
